description_en: Hambourg may not be a Muslim-majority destination, but it welcomes Muslim travelers with real halal options. You'll find 200 halal restaurants and 35 mosques nearby, plus real-time prayer times and the Qibla direction — everything to explore Hambourg, Germany, with peace of mind.
metaDescription_en: Halal guide to Hambourg: 200+ halal restaurants, 35 mosques, prayer times and tips for Muslim travelers. Halal Trust Score 3.7/5.
